title: JourneyMap
description: Real-time map used for mapping in-game or your browser as you explore.
body:
![JourneyMap](http://i.imgur.com/322B1np.png)

  **Real-time mapping in game or in a web browser as you explore.**

  JourneyMap is a client+server mod for [Forge](https://forums.minecraftforge.net/), [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), and [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/) which maps your Minecraft world in real-time as you
  explore. You can view the map in a web browser or in-game as a Minimap or full-screen.

  ## Note: Server currently is for controlling journeymap features from the server, no mapping is done on the server at this time. JourneyMap needs to be on the client if anything is to be displayed. 

  #### Server and Client Optional means, Clients can connect to servers that do not have JourneyMap on the server side, Clients without JourneyMap can connect to servers that have the mod installed on it. 

  #### Help and Documentation

  - Guides and tutorials: [http://journeymap.info](http://journeymap.info)
  - **Support available on [JourneyMap Discord](https://discord.gg/eP8gE69) server**

  #### Bukkit/Paper Server Admin?

  Check out [http://journeymap.info/Server](https://teamjm.github.io/journeymap-docs/latest/server/basic-usage/) for information and configuration details.

  #### Need to generate large map images?

  Check out the **[JourneyMap Tools](https://github.com/TeamJM/journeymap-tools)** project.
